stemHtml: An aircraft passes the holding fix at 15:30. ATC issues a clearance with an Expected Approach Time (EAT) of 15:38. To comply with clearance, at what time should the pilot cross the fix to leave the holding pattern?

options.a: At 15:38, to comply with the EAT given by ATC.
options.b: At 15:39, because it is better to pass the fix slightly later than the specified time.
options.c: At 15:37, to allow enough time to complete a full 360° turn if needed.
options.d: At any time, provided ATC clearance is maintained.
